title: kalanchoe crenata var. coccinea
intro: Kalanchoe crenata var. coccinea, commonly known as the red Kalanchoe, is a flowering plant species in the succulent family Crassulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its leaves and stems are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Kalanchoe crenata var. coccinea include treating fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
